This Site

I’m beginning to bring my ideas to life and practice what I believe in. I’m hoping this space will be a dynamic test ground and showcase, as well as my online haven for writing, exploring, and learning. This site is always growing, so it might not always be perfect or completely polished. If you run into any problems, like strange behavior, display issues, or outright glitches, please let me know.

I’m a big believer in the open web and its incredible potential. I’ve always dreamed of creating something that will last, unlike the isolated sites and services we use today. (Looking at you, MySpace and Twitter.) Content can vanish overnight, but this space will always be here in some form. I want it to be a home for as long as I need it to be.

This website is built on Eleventy static site generator, with deployment to Netlify. Maybe one of those fancy CMSes someday. Who knows?

If you run into any problems, like strange behavior, display issues, or outright glitches, please let me know.

  • Github
  • Mastodon
  • Feed

If you see something broken, a problem or something, you can report an issue. Or not you do you.
